name: Solio_Roads_V2_WGS84
description: Solio road network v2 — traced from the printed reserve map, georeferenced, noded and simplified. source=manual_connector marks drawn bridge decks added by hand. status=unconfirmed_crossing marks edges over a crossing still awaiting confirmation (S05 Kingfisher Dam, S22 orphanage corner). status=private_no_guest_routing marks the Marriotts private road (S18/S20) — confirmed real, but closed to guest routing at Solio's request (2026-07-14); the app will not route a guest onto it. Crossings S06, S16 and S21 were confirmed by Solio on 2026-07-14 and are now status=ok.
